title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd!
